summary: Comprehensive testing of SeknuTo.cz new features: Admin Dashboard with 5 tabs, Customer Reviews section, Gallery page, and Blog. All features working correctly.

issues: EmailPopup appears on page load and blocks interactions - needs to be closed first. Minor UX consideration.

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/login with correct password (SeknuTo2025!) returns token
POST /api/admin/login with wrong password returns 401
GET /api/admin/stats returns all expected fields (total_bookings, pending_bookings, active_vouchers, total_coupons, total_subscribers, total_revenue_estimate)
GET /api/admin/stats without auth returns 401
GET /api/admin/bookings returns bookings array
GET /api/admin/vouchers returns vouchers array
GET /api/admin/coupons returns coupons array
GET /api/blog/posts returns published posts list
GET /api/blog/posts/{slug} returns post detail
GET /api/blog/posts/nonexistent returns 404
GET /api/admin/blog/posts returns all posts (admin)
Admin login page displays password input and login button
Admin dashboard loads after successful login
Admin Overview tab shows stats (29 bookings, 1 active voucher, 24 coupons, 24 subscribers, 36,652 Kč revenue)
Admin Poukazů (Vouchers) tab shows create form with all fields (code, name, type, value, max_uses, dates, campaign, flyer_batch)
Admin Kupóny (Coupons) tab shows create form (code, percent, description)
Admin Objednávky tab shows bookings list with expandable rows
Admin Blog tab shows create post form and posts list (2 posts)
Admin logout works - returns to login page
Homepage loads with Header containing 'Naše práce' and 'Blog' navigation links
Homepage Reviews section visible with 6 review cards
Homepage Reviews section shows 5-star ratings and customer testimonials
Gallery page /nase-prace loads with filter buttons (Vše, Hrubé sekání, Jarní balíček, etc.)
Gallery filter buttons work - clicking filters projects
Gallery cards show before/after photos with hover effect
Gallery lightbox opens on card click and closes with Escape
Blog list page /blog shows 2 published posts with cover images
Blog detail page shows article content with proper formatting
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_and_blog.py - Created new test file for admin and blog API testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all admin dashboard, gallery, blog, reviews features working)

seed_data_creation: 2 blog posts exist in database (5-chyb-pri-sekani-travniku, jak-pecovat-o-travnik-na-jare)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: Admin dashboard at /admin with password login, 5 tabs (Přehled, Poukazů, Kupóny, Objednávky, Blog). Homepage has 6 review cards with star ratings. Gallery at /nase-prace has filter buttons and before/after hover effect with lightbox. Blog at /blog shows 2 posts. Header has 'Naše práce' and 'Blog' links. Note: EmailPopup blocks interactions on initial page load - close it before testing.
